title: Communication-Efficient On-Device Machine Learning: Federated Distillation and Augmentation under Non-IID Private Data
abstract: On-device machine learning (ML) enables the training process to exploit a massive amount of user-generated private data samples. To enjoy this benefit, inter-device communication overhead should be minimized. With this end, we propose federated distillation (FD), a distributed model training algorithm whose communication payload size is much smaller than a benchmark scheme, federated learning (FL), particularly when the model size is large. Moreover, user-generated data samples are likely to become non-IID across devices, which commonly degrades the performance compared to the case with an IID dataset. To cope with this, we propose federated augmentation (FAug), where each device collectively trains a generative model, and thereby augments its local data towards yielding an IID dataset. Empirical studies demonstrate that FD with FAug yields around 26x less communication overhead while achieving 95-98% test accuracy compared to FL.
summary: 针对设备端联邦学习在非IID私有数据下通信开销大与准确率下降的问题，本文提出联邦蒸馏（FD）与联邦增强（FAug）。FD通过交换每标签的平均logit向量而非模型参数，使通信负荷仅取决于输出维度，大幅降低通信量；FAug利用服务器侧集体训练的生成模型（GAN）为每个设备补全缺失的数据样本，将非IID数据纠正为IID分布，并给出隐私-通信权衡策略。实验表明，在非IID MNIST数据集上，FD结合FAug相比传统联邦学习（FL）可减少约26倍通信开销，同时达到95–98%的测试准确率。
idea: 通过联邦蒸馏，各设备仅上传按标签平均的模型输出logit，而非模型参数，服务器聚合得到全局平均logit作为蒸馏教师信号；配合联邦增强，各设备上传少量样本到服务器训练GAN，然后下载生成器补全本地缺失标签，以矫正非IID数据分布。
innovation: 1) 提出联邦蒸馏（FD），将知识蒸馏推广到联邦场景，通信负载与模型大小解耦，仅与输出类别数相关；2) 提出联邦增强（FAug），利用GAN在服务器端集体生成缺失数据，避免直接交换原始数据，同时通过冗余标签上传控制隐私泄露；3) 定量定义了设备-服务器隐私泄漏与设备间隐私泄漏，给出权衡方案。

innovation_points.point: 首次将在线知识蒸馏应用于联邦学习环境，通过交换每类平均logit而非模型参数，通信开销不随模型增大而上升。
innovation_points.evidence: the proposed FD exchanges not the model parameters but the model output, allowing on-device ML to adopt large-sized local models. [...] each device in FD stores per-label mean logit vectors, and periodically uploads these local-average logit vectors to a server.

innovation_points.point: 提出联邦增强（FAug），在服务器上利用GAN集体训练生成模型，各设备下载生成器补全缺失标签，将非IID本地数据转换为IID，且通过上传冗余标签来保护目标标签隐私。
innovation_points.evidence: we propose FAug where each device can locally generate the missing data samples using a generative model. [...] Each device ... uploads few seed data samples of these target labels to the server ... The server oversamples the uploaded seed data samples ... so as to train a conditional GAN. ... downloading the trained GAN's generator empowers each device to replenish the target labels until reaching an IID training dataset.

innovation_points.point: 形式化定义了设备-服务器隐私泄漏与设备间隐私泄漏，并提出冗余标签策略在两者之间取得平衡。
innovation_points.evidence: To keep these target labels private from the server, the device additionally uploads redundant data samples from the labels other than the target labels. The privacy leakage from each device to the server, denoted as device-server privacy leakage (PL), is thereby reduced at the cost of extra uplink communication overhead. [...] The target label information of a device can also be leaked to the other devices ... This privacy leakage is quantified by inter-device PL.

flow_steps: FD流程: 1) 每个设备本地训练时，为每个标签累积模型输出logit，定期计算每个标签的本地平均logit并上传至服务器；2) 服务器收集所有设备的本地平均logit，计算每个标签的全局平均（排除当前设备自身），下发至各设备；3) 设备在下一步训练中，将对应标签的全局平均logit作为蒸馏教师信号，与交叉熵损失共同构成训练目标。
FAug流程: 1) 每个设备识别本地缺少的数据标签（目标标签），选取少量目标标签种子样本和若干冗余标签样本，上传至服务器；2) 服务器对接收到的样本进行过采样（例如利用Google图像搜索）以扩充训练集，并用其训练条件GAN；3) 服务器将训练好的生成器分发至所有设备；4) 设备利用生成器生成目标标签的合成样本，直至本地数据集成为IID分布，之后进行本地或联邦学习。
applications: 通信资源受限的移动设备端联邦学习；敏感数据（如医疗、金融）的隐私保护协作训练；分布式传感器网络中的模型训练；个人终端数据不平衡时的模型构建
limitations: The proposed FD and FAug are validated only on MNIST, leaving generalizability unknown. Communication efficiency of FD relies on a small number of labels, and may degrade for many-class problems. FAug incurs residual privacy leakage between devices unless device count is large, and uploading seed samples still poses device-server privacy risks.

limitation_points.point: The inter-device privacy leakage of FAug is minimized only when the number of devices is sufficiently large; in small-scale systems it remains non-negligible.
limitation_points.evidence: From Section 3: 'This minimum leakage can be achieved so long as the number of devices is sufficiently large, regardless of the sizes of the target and redundant labels.'

limitation_points.point: Experiments are limited to MNIST, making the effectiveness on more complex datasets or larger models uncertain.
limitation_points.evidence: Section 4 starts with: 'In this section, we evaluate the proposed FD and FAug under a non-IID MNIST training dataset that is constructed by the following procedure.'

limitation_points.point: FD's communication overhead scales with the number of labels, which could become problematic for tasks with many classes.
limitation_points.evidence: Abstract states communication payload is 'much smaller than a benchmark scheme, federated learning (FL), particularly when the model size is large,' implying dependence on output dimension (labels) rather than model size.

citation_text: Eunjeong Jeong, Seungeun Oh, Hyesung Kim, Seong-Lyun Kim (n.d.). Communication-Efficient On-Device Machine Learning: Federated Distillation and Augmentation under Non-IID Private Data.
